title: Delivery worker HTTP client follows redirects
description: The delivery worker in src/delivery.rs:98 builds its own reqwest::Client with only a timeout — no redirect::Policy::none(). The shared http_client in AppState has redirect::Policy::none() (server.rs:53), but the delivery worker creates a separate client that will silently follow HTTP redirects. This bypasses the SSRF defense at delivery time: a malicious follower whose inbox responds with a 301 to an internal IP gets followed. Fix: pass redirect::Policy::none() to the delivery worker client builder, same as the main client.
close_reason: Fixed: redirect::Policy::none on all clients, require Digest+Date headers, corrected body limit comment
